text: Department Library-CSE – Siddhartha University Skip to content Search Search Home Faculty Faculty Staff Research Projects & Grants In-house Projects Faculty Publications Faculty Participations IPRs Consultancy Research Group Students Internships Publications Achievements Professional Societies Innovative Models Placements Infrastructure Academic Labs Specialized Labs AR/VR/XR Laboratory Cyber Security Lab Central Server Room Innovation Hub Department Library Events Updates News Letters Home Faculty Faculty Staff Research Projects & Grants In-house Projects Faculty Publications Faculty Participations IPRs Consultancy Research Group Students Internships Publications Achievements Professional Societies Innovative Models Placements Infrastructure Academic Labs Specialized Labs AR/VR/XR Laboratory Cyber Security Lab Central Server Room Innovation Hub Department Library Events Updates News Letters Department Library The Department Library of the Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) department offers a comprehensive array of software and digital resources to support academic and research needs. The library contains a good number of Books, E-Books, Journals, and e-resources, including Knimbus and DELNET. These resources are readily accessible both on-site and remotely for all registered users within the campus network. Students and faculty can utilize their designated login credentials to seamlessly explore and utilize the available resources, fostering a conducive environment for learning and research within the department. Library Resources Total Number of Books 603 Total Number of E-Books 1038 Total Number of Journals/Magazines National 17 International (Online Only) IEEE, ASCE, ELSEVIER, J-GATE, N-List, Delnet 686 Total Number of Project Reports 420 Total Number of CD-ROM 100 Library Software Libsys LSM 10 Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC) – For checking Library Books (Title/Author/Keywords) of the total collection available in the Library.
